message:
🐛 Fix 47 test failures: add missing wsAuth/demoMode mocks and token setup (#10758)

- useUpdateProgress.test.ts (32 failures): add wsAuth mock and isDemoMode
  to demoMode mock — appendWsAuthToken called isDemoMode() which was
  undefined from the incomplete mock, throwing in connect()'s catch block
- kubectlProxy.quantity.test.ts (14 failures): add missing wsAuth mock
  matching all other kubectlProxy split test files
- sseClient-expand.test.ts (1 failure): set localStorage token before 401
  test — emitSseAuthFailure now requires a stored token (#10746 change)

Fixes #10754

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
